jobs.name: Protect margin in volatile markets
jobs.what_it_is: Continuously maintain profitability despite raw material price swings and supply uncertainty.
jobs.outcome: Stable or improved margin and predictable earnings.

steps.step: Monitor ingredient and energy cost evolution
steps.description: Track market indices, supplier prices, contracts and energy trends; receive alerts for abnormal movements.

steps.step: Understand exposure by product and customer
steps.description: See which products, formulas and customers are most impacted by changes and quantify margin risk.
Initiate simulations in formulation or propose commercial price adjustments.
Ensure substitutions or changes will not violate specs, contracts or performance.
Review financial projections and authorize operational or commercial actions.
Compare predicted savings with actual outcomes and refine future decisions.

jobs.name: Create the optimal recipe
jobs.what_it_is: Build a formulation that satisfies nutrient and business constraints at minimal cost.
jobs.outcome: Feasible, compliant and profitable formula ready for production.

steps.description: Choose available and approved raw materials based on nutrition, price and supply.
Define limits, ratios, inclusion rules, customer specs and plant restrictions.
Execute least-cost or multi-objective calculation to generate viable formulas.
Compare options by cost, risk, availability and production practicality.
Confirm batching feasibility, pelletability, physical properties or process impact.
Send recipe through governance workflow with justification and documentation.

jobs.name: Execute the plan reliably
jobs.what_it_is: Deliver production according to schedule while managing real-world constraints.
jobs.outcome: High adherence to plan with minimal disruption.

steps.description: Obtain prioritized orders, sequences and quantities from planning.
Verify raw material availability, staffing and equipment readiness.
Release instructions and recipes to operators or automation.
Handle shortages, breakdowns or quality holds and re-plan if necessary.
Capture real consumption, times, yields and deviations.
Compare planned vs actual and explain variances.

jobs.name: Release safe and compliant product
jobs.what_it_is: Ensure products meet specifications and legal requirements before shipment.

steps.description: Set which tests are required based on risk, material and regulations.
Collect results automatically or manually and ensure completeness.
Evaluate conformity versus specifications and tolerances.
Decide disposition and communicate to operations and logistics.
Produce COAs, compliance statements and audit evidence.

jobs.name: Buy at the best risk-adjusted cost
jobs.what_it_is: Secure materials at optimal price while maintaining supply continuity.
jobs.outcome: Lower input costs and reduced supply risk.

steps.description: Understand upcoming volume needs from production and forecast.
Evaluate price, availability, reliability and quality history.
Check commitments, hedges and open exposure.
See how purchases influence recipe cost and flexibility.
Issue POs, confirm delivery schedules and monitor execution.

jobs.name: Keep the landscape stable and integrated
jobs.what_it_is: Ensure systems are reliable, secure and connected.
jobs.outcome: High availability, trusted data and satisfied users.

steps.description: Ensure data flows between ERP, formulation, MES, labs and partners.
Track uptime, latency, failures and respond quickly.
Plan deployments while minimizing disruption.
Apply roles, auditability, data protection and compliance.
Provide trusted capabilities so users avoid spreadsheets or side tools.
